revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=BLP_sources%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{tlr|BLP refimprove}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use|91281}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} {{AWB standard installation}} {{Ombox |type = notice |text =
'''Contentious material that is unsourced or poorly sourced must be removed immediately, especially if potentially libelous or harmful.''' '''Alternatives:''' * In [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|BLP]] articles that have no sources at all, the '''{{tls|prod blp}}''' template should be used. Otherwise, use '''{{Tl|BLP unsourced}}'''. * In [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|non-BLP]] articles that require additional sources, the '''{{Tl|More citations needed}}''' template should be used instead. * '''[[Wikipedia:Be bold|Be bold!]]''' Consider searching for [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|references]] and adding them to the article, instead of this template. * Consider not adding this template to extremely short articles.
}} {{Lua|Module:Unsubst|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == This template is intended to be placed at the top of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|articles about living persons]] that need additional references, and are therefore in need of immediate attention. If the article is not about a living or recently deceased subject, you may wish to use {{Tl|More citations needed}} instead. Please add a date parameter. Adding a date parameter sorts the article into subcategories of [[:Category:BLP articles lacking sources]] and out of the parent category, allowing the oldest problems to be identified and dealt with first. Finally, if the article has a defaultsort, this is used for these categories as well. Otherwise, it is sorted on the first word (usually the first name). ==Parameters== * date = {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} - required parameter, will be added by bot * reason = text - optional parameter which appends advisory text The following parameter is obsolete: {{para|{{red|suffix}}}} (simply use the first unnamed parameter). === Examples === :Paste-ready example: {{Tlc|BLP sources|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} :Example with reason: {{Tlc|BLP sources|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |reason{{=}} }} This template can be used with a "section" parameter to tag specific sections: {{Tlc|BLP sources|section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} == Redirects == The following templates redirect here: {{div col|colwidth=22em}} * {{Tlf|BLP+}} * {{Tlf|BLP Improvereferences}} * {{Tlf|BLP improvereferences}} * {{Tlf|blp improvereferences}} * {{Tlf|BLPImprovereferences}} * {{Tlf|BLPimprovereferences}} * {{Tlf|blpimprovereferences}} * {{Tlf|BLPmoreref}} * {{Tlf|BLP Refimprove}} * {{Tlf|BLP refimprove}} * {{Tlf|blp refimprove}} * {{Tlf|BLPRefimprove}} * {{Tlf|BLPrefimprove}} * {{Tlf|blprefimprove}} * {{Tlf|BLP Sources}} * {{Tlf|blp sources}} * {{Tlf|BLPSources}} * {{Tlf|BLPsources}} * {{Tlf|blpsources}} * {{Tlf|BLP more sources}} * {{Tlf|refimprove-BLP}} * {{Tlf|BLP refimprove}} * {{Tlf|BLP citations needed}} {{div col end}} ==Tracking categories== The template populates: * {{clc|Pages using BLP sources with unknown parameters}} – when unrecognized parameters are invoked on the transcluding page. == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Section", "description": "Add \"section\" if the tag applies to a particular section", "type": "string" }, "date": { "label": "Date", "description": "The month and year the template was added, in the form \"July 2013\"", "type": "string", "required": true, "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "June 2016" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "A reason for adding the tag", "type": "string" } } } == See also == * {{tl|BLP IMDb refimprove}} – for biographies of living persons (BLPs) that rely primarily or entirely on the Internet Movie Database (IMDb) as a source * {{tl|BLP unsourced}} – for biographies of living persons (BLPs) that do not include any references or sources * {{tl|BLP more footnotes needed}} – for BLPs that include a list of sources or external links, but have insufficient inline citations * {{tl|BLP no footnotes}} – for BLPs that include a list of sources or external links, but have no inline citations at all * {{tl|BLP unverified}} – for [[Wikipedia:Stub|stubbing]] inadequately referenced BLPs * {{tl|BLP-notice}} – for BLP articles that are being discussed on the [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons/Noticeboard|BLP noticeboard]] * {{tl|Like resume}} – for biographical articles that promote the subject * [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons]] * [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] {{Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Citation and verifiability maintenance templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
